examples: Noni leaf has been used for the treatment of gingivitis, periodontal diseases, laryngalgia, laryngitis, sprain, skin disease, and so on.
Bacteria in plaque also cause gingivitis and other periodontal diseases.
The most common oral diseases are dental cavities and periodontal (gum) disease.
Other major risk factors for periodontal disease include genito-urinary infections, smoking and excessive alcohol drinking.
Dr Iacopino said more research was needed, particularly into whether the risk of diabetes decreases when periodontal disease is treated.
